overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player character walking through a dystopian urban slum. The scene transitions from a graffiti-covered underpass with a burning car to an open rooftop overlooking a busy street with NPCs and vehicles, set against a backdrop of rocky hills and distant skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under concrete overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: burning car with thick black smoke visible on the right side
passing the burning car and continuing deeper under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along a graffiti-covered concrete wall under an overpass, passing a burning sedan on the right

entered.detail: tall concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags including red and cyan spray paint
silver sedan engulfed in flames with thick black smoke rising from the engine bay
underside of a concrete bridge creating a covered walkway with visible support beams
large cylindrical industrial pipe running along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass in a narrow covered walkway. The camera moves forward past a burning car on the right, with graffiti-covered walls on the right and industrial pipes on the left. The environment is sheltered from direct sunlight, creating a shadowed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop platform with garbage piles and scattered debris

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into an open rooftop area with bright sunlight
approaching a large mound of garbage bags and scattered cardboard debris

agents.ego_description: emerging from the covered walkway onto an open rooftop platform littered with cardboard and debris, moving toward a garbage pile

entered.detail: large mound of blue and green garbage bags piled on the concrete surface
scattered pieces of cardboard and trash littering the ground
tall futuristic skyscrapers visible through the haze in the distance
elevated highway or monorail tracks running parallel to the viewpoint

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered walkway into bright sunlight on an open rooftop platform. The scene features a large pile of garbage bags in the center, scattered cardboard debris, and the first views of a distant city skyline and an elevated overpass structure to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated viewpoint overlooking a curved street intersection

events.description: reaching the edge of the platform revealing the street and intersection below
vehicles including a truck driving on the street below, NPCs walking along the road

agents.ego_description: walking along the ledge and looking down at the street activity below, observing NPCs and traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking along the curved street below the viewpoint
large truck driving along the road beneath the overpass

entered.detail: curved asphalt street with tire marks and scattered pedestrians
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the edge of the street
wooden power pole with multiple electrical wires running across the scene
makeshift buildings and market stalls built under the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the edge of an elevated platform overlooking a curved street below. The scene shows active street life with NPCs walking and vehicles driving on the road beneath. Red and white traffic barriers line the street, and makeshift structures are visible under the distant overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated slum area with rocky hillside and shanty buildings

events.description: turning left to reveal the rocky hillside with densely packed shanty structures
view of extensive slum buildings built into the red rocky cliff face

agents.ego_description: continuing along the ledge and panning to view the rocky hillside with shanty buildings built into the cliff

entered.detail: large red rocky cliff face with buildings constructed directly into the rock
densely packed makeshift structures and shacks climbing up the rock face
large empty billboard structure visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a dramatic view of a rocky hillside with a shanty town built into the cliff face. The camera moves along the ledge showing the contrast between the concrete platform and the red rocky terrain, with makeshift structures stacked against the rock and an empty billboard visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a shadowed industrial underpass into a bright, expansive urban vista overlooking a cliffside slum. It begins in a narrow covered walkway, moving past a burning car and graffiti-covered walls beneath a concrete overpass. As the camera emerges from the shadows, the scene opens into bright sunlight on a rooftop platform cluttered with garbage bags and cardboard debris, revealing a distant city skyline. The perspective then shifts to the edge of the elevated platform, looking down upon a curved street filled with active traffic and pedestrians. Finally, the view expands to reveal a dramatic rocky hillside where a shanty town is built directly into the red cliff face beneath an empty billboard.
